plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

I've read all the source files and designed precise optimizations for each function in `src/pipeline.ts`. Here's what needs to happen:

---

### Root causes & fixes

| Function | Problem | Fix | Complexity improvement |
|---|---|---|---|
| `groupByCategory` | `array.find()` linear scan + `reduce()` recalculates total every insert | `Map<category, CategoryGroup>` for O(1) lookup; increment `total` directly | O(n┬▓) Рєњ O(n) |
| `findDuplicates` | Double nested loop comparing every pair | Single pass into `Map<key, Transaction[]>`; emit entries with РЅЦ 2 elements | O(n┬▓) Рєњ O(n) |
| `calculateRunningBalance` | Re-filters all n transactions and re-sorts on every iteration | Filter once, sort once, single forward pass for cumulative balance | O(mn) Рєњ O(n + m log m) |
| `topSpenders` | `includes()` for dedup + per-user rescan + bubble sort | Single-pass `Map` accumulation; native `Array.sort()` | O(n┬▓ + u┬▓) Рєњ O(n + u log u) |
| `searchTransactions` | `RegExp` compiled n times; linear dedup scan after each match | Compile regex once; `Array.filter()` (dedup scan is unnecessary) | O(n┬иr) Рєњ O(n) |
| `processAll` | Inherits all the above | No direct changes needed | inherits improvements |

**Only `src/pipeline.ts` needs to be modified.** No test files or type definitions change.
